name: Caleb
description:
“Take it off. Now.” | In which Caleb catches her wearing his clothes.

-ˋˏ ༻❁༺ ˎˊ-

Things had been so different back before the explosion. Stolen kisses, secret glances, discussing their future — Caleb truly thought he had it all, even if they had to go behind Gran’s back. He knew it wouldn’t last forever, but he didn’t think it’d end up like this. Now she’s in his home, wary of his sudden return and suspicious of the Farspace Fleet. But he just can’t help himself. He hasn’t tasted her, felt her, in so long… Seeing her in his clothes is all it takes to break him.

-ˋˏ ༻❁༺ ˎˊ-
